aboutSection.label: Know About Me
aboutSection.bio1: I'm Will Wu, a senior backend engineer with 4+ years of experience building production systems at scale. From enterprise AI platforms to content platforms serving 2M+ MAU, I specialize in designing robust architectures with Python, Go, and TypeScript.
aboutSection.bio2: I hold an MS in Data Analytics Engineering from George Mason University and a BS in Chemical Engineering from Tatung University. My cross-disciplinary background gives me a unique perspective on solving complex engineering problems.
aboutSection.bio3: I'm passionate about building systems that make a real impact — whether it's optimizing database queries for 80% faster response times or architecting microservices from scratch.

explore.label: My Site
explore.guestbookText: Let me know you were here

cta.availability: I'm available for full-time roles & freelance projects.
cta.description: I thrive on crafting dynamic web applications, and delivering seamless user experiences.

aboutPage.label: About Me
aboutPage.story1: My journey into tech began with a Chemical Engineering degree, but I quickly discovered my true passion lay in building software. After earning my MS in Data Analytics Engineering from George Mason University, I dove into backend development.
aboutPage.story2: Today, I specialize in building scalable backend systems using Python, Go, and TypeScript. From enterprise AI platforms to content platforms serving millions of users, I thrive on designing architectures that perform under real-world pressure.
aboutPage.story3: I've led engineering teams, built microservices from scratch, and optimized systems for dramatic performance gains. I'm always exploring new technologies — from LLM integration to infrastructure as code.
aboutPage.cleanCodeDesc: Writing maintainable, well-documented code that stands the test of time.
aboutPage.userExperienceDesc: Creating intuitive interfaces that users love to interact with.
aboutPage.continuousLearningDesc: Staying updated with the latest technologies and best practices.
aboutPage.ctaText: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it.
